title: Hi, Is it possible to add a `0:00` string in meeting notes/description, to enable youtube to create video chapters?
body:
Hi, Is it possible to add a `0:00` string in meeting notes/description, to enable youtube to create video chapters?

See random podman video description - the only thing needed is additional item straight below the "Topics:", containing string "0:00" (it might be something like `* Intro (0:00 in the video)`

![obraz](https://github.com/containers/podman/assets/4583553/2a57199a-4518-415b-9b0f-1a7c4d13452b)

_Originally posted by @lstolcman in https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/11635#discussioncomment-8522599_
